messages.content: write a 56 words description: Ethan's independence improved a lot. He is always the first one to tidy up when play time is finished, and finish class activities all by himself. he obtained skills like tidy up after meals and change clothes. Stop using nappy during nap time is a huge progress for Ethan.

Ethan has made tremendous strides in becoming independent. He consistently takes the initiative to tidy up after playtime and completes class activities without assistance. He has also gained skills in cleaning up after meals and changing clothes. A significant achievement for Ethan is the ability to forgo using a nappy during nap time, marking great progress in his journey towards self-sufficiency.

write a 56 words description: When studying the "This is Me" unit, we learned to express our feeling, this help Ethan quickly settled in and move out the shy phase. He really enjoyed sharing his family trip to Sichuan with us after the National Day Holiday.

During the "This is Me" unit, we focused on expressing our feelings, which greatly aided Ethan in overcoming his shyness. We saw a marked improvement as he quickly settled in and became more confident. Ethan enthusiastically shared his family's trip to Sichuan with us after the National Day Holiday, showing his growing comfort in opening up and sharing personal experiences.

write a description within 60 words: Ethan really enjoyed exploring natural phenomena while studying the "Weather Wonder" unit. He had so much fun walking in the rain with his oil-paper umbrella painting. He also very engaged in the Thunder Drum game.

Ethan had a fantastic time immersing himself in the fascinating world of natural phenomena during the "Weather Wonder" unit. He delighted in walking in the rain, happily creating artwork with his oil-paper umbrella. Ethan's participation in the Thunder Drum game showcased his strong enthusiasm and engagement with the subject matter.

write a description within 60 words: Ethan was very brave when interacting with the alien whose spaceship had crash landed in our school. He role played as a doctor and helped to cure the alien. He also create his own flying saucer as the Christmas Tree decoration.

Ethan's courage shone through as he bravely interacted with an alien whose spaceship had crash-landed at our school. He fearlessly took on the role of a doctor and assisted in nursing the alien back to health. Additionally, Ethan showcased his creativity by crafting his very own flying saucer as a unique Christmas tree decoration.
write a description within 60 words: Ethan show great interests in exploring science. He participate really well in STEAM class. He also show good understanding while learning mathematical concepts.

Ethan's passion for science is evident as he actively engages in STEAM classes, demonstrating a genuine interest in exploring the subject. Moreover, he displays a solid grasp of mathematical concepts, showcasing a strong understanding and proficiency in this area. Ethan's enthusiasm for learning and his ability to apply knowledge make him a standout student in these subjects.

Ethan is now one of the most popular child in class. He could play with various group of children in different games. He is a team player, very good at sharing and cooperating with others, therefore he could team up with anyone during group activities.

Ethan has become a beloved figure in the classroom, earning popularity among his peers. His ability to seamlessly interact and play with different groups of children in various games is remarkable. He embodies the qualities of a team player, excelling in sharing, and consistently cooperating with others. Ethan's excellent social skills allow him to effortlessly join and contribute to any team during group activities.

Ethan's English skill improve a lot, he always volunteers himself to do head count, tell day of the week and weather during IEYC English class. He also confident enough to do "Show and Tell" in front of the class. He would use single word to express himself, but then he would repeat the full sentence after teacher.

Ethan's English skills have seen significant growth as he eagerly volunteers for tasks such as head count, sharing the day of the week, and describing the weather during IEYC English class. His confidence has soared to the point where he comfortably participates in "Show and Tell" presentations in front of the class. Although initially using single words to express himself, Ethan is now motivated to repeat full sentences after the teacher, showcasing his expanding language abilities.

His confidence has soared to the point where he comfortably participates in “Show and Tell” presentations in front of the class. Although initially using single words to express himself, Ethan is now motivated to repeat full sentences after the teacher, showcasing his expanding language abilities.

Ethan's English skills have blossomed as he eagerly volunteers for tasks like head count, sharing the day and weather in IEYC English class. His confidence has surged, allowing him to comfortably participate in "Show and Tell" presentations. Though he initially used single words, Ethan is now motivated to repeat full sentences after the teacher, demonstrating his flourishing language abilities.

write a description within 60 words: Ethan did a fantastic job performing on stage and recording the video in the Winter Celebration Concert. He also did well in the Sport Day. Hope he could more independent next time when parents are around.

Ethan delivered an outstanding performance in both the Winter Celebration Concert and during the Sport Day activities. His efforts on stage and in recording the video were commendable. Going forward, it is hoped that Ethan continues to build independence, especially when parents are present, to further enhance his growth and capabilities.

His efforts on stage and in recording the video were commendable. Going forward, it is hoped that Ethan continues to build confidence, especially when standing on stage, to further enhance his growth and capabilities.
